texto: When I became prime minister last September, I promised the Japanese people that I would not tolerate the politics of indecision. A propensity to delay difficult and weighty decisions has been hurting our country. It is detrimental to our economy, society and future, and it cannot be allowed to continue.
explicacao: Citação de Yoshihiko Noda sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “When I became prime minister last September, I promised the Japanese people that I would not tole…” articula saude-mental, future, society em registro de saude mental, com relevância para contextos como society e decisions.
